positive: Minimalist, high-contrast silhouette of a mythical celestial creature (like a stylized griffin or celestial whale) intertwined with abstract geometric constellations and flowing cosmic energy. The scene should be centered and perfectly balanced, suitable for a front-of-shirt print. Use deep indigo and midnight blue as primary background colors, accented with luminous gold and ethereal cyan for the energy and highlights. Style must be a blend of elegant linework, modern abstract design, and tattoo art aesthetics. Crisp, solid lines, perfect symmetry, vector quality, high detail, negative space emphasized. Studio lighting, print-ready composition, clean lines, graphic novel feel.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, words, logo, brand, copyrighted, cartoon, photorealism, low contrast, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy
